Fields.Name: SFX ID
Fields.Description: The SFX used for this entry.

Fields.Name: Generation Direction
Fields.Description: The direction in which the SFX is generated.

Fields.Name: Maintain Direction
Fields.Description: The direction that the SFX is maintained in.

Fields.Name: Disable Head
Fields.Description: If enabled, disable occurrence on the head.

Fields.Name: Disable Body
Fields.Description: If enabled, disable occurrence on the body.

Fields.Name: Disable Right Arm
Fields.Description: If enabled, disable occurrence on the right arm.

Fields.Name: Disable Left Arm
Fields.Description: If enabled, disable occurrence on the left arm.

Fields.Name: Disable Right Hand
Fields.Description: If enabled, disable occurrence on the right hand.

Fields.Name: Disable Left Hand
Fields.Description: If enabled, disable occurrence on the left hand.

Fields.Name: Disable Right Leg
Fields.Description: If enabled, disable occurrence on the right leg.

Fields.Name: Disable Left Leg
Fields.Description: If enabled, disable occurrence on the left leg.

Fields.Name: Generation Time
Fields.Description: The time for the SFX generation.

Fields.Name: Sound ID
Fields.Description: The sound ID to play when generating the SFX.
